problem.description: After npx viepilot install for Claude Code, ~/.claude/skills stays empty — no /vp-* commands in Claude Code
symptoms: User expects claude-code target to populate Claude skill directory

hypotheses.description: buildInstallPlan only wrote skills under ~/.cursor/skills; --target was informational
Claude Code reads ~/.claude/skills per official docs

tests_run.output: installTargets not passed; no .claude path in plan

findings: FEAT-001 doc already described manual symlink as workaround.
Product fix: pass selectedTargets as installTargets; mirror vp-* to ~/.claude/skills when claude-code ∈ targets.

resolution.root_cause: Installer never copied skills to ~/.claude/skills; Claude Code does not load ~/.cursor/skills.
resolution.fix_applied: v1.9.4: buildInstallPlan(opts.installTargets) duplicates skill copy/symlink to ~/.claude/skills when claude-code selected; uninstall removes ~/.claude/skills/vp-* for that target; docs + tests updated.
resolution.verification: npm test 304 pass; dry-run shows copyDir ... -> ~/.claude/skills/vp-*
